subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Though I be a sinner, yet I place my trust in Thy forgiveness. I am destitute and poor, whilst Thou art the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار هر چند گنهکارم ولی به بخششت اميدوار مستمندم و فقير توئی ارجمند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for assistance; intercession
